title: Savory Greek Brussels Sprouts Stew
description: A hearty, Mediterranean stew bursting with earthy Brussels sprouts, tender fish, and aromatic herbs, perfect for a comforting dinner.

ingredients.name: Oregano & thyme
ingredients.amount: 1 tsp dried oregano + 1/2 tsp dried thyme

ingredients.name: Fish fillets
ingredients.notes: firm white fish, cut into 1-inch cubes

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 4 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add halved Brussels sprouts and sauté until lightly browned, about 4 minutes.
Stir in tomato paste and cook for 1 minute to deepen the flavor.
Pour in white wine, deglaze the pan, and let it reduce for 2 minutes.
Add diced tomatoes and vegetable broth, bring to a gentle simmer. Season with oregano & thyme, salt, and pepper to taste. Simmer for 15 minutes until sprouts are tender.
Add fish cubes and cook for 5-6 minutes until the fish is opaque and cooked through.
Stir in lemon juice, adjusting seasoning if needed.
Remove from heat and fold in chopped parsley.
Serve hot, optionally with crusty bread on the side.
